ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Sep-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Douglas Bassin and Scott Bassin for Margaret Mary Tucker.

Counsel addressed the issue of whether the presumption of Probate Code 6124 applies stating that the decedent was incompetent as he had been diagnosed with a medical condition well before his death and wasn't able to keep control over his papers, that the client is out of State and was not able to take control of any documents, that the attorney who had possession of the will mailed it to the decedent and that they have not heard of any objections. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated November 3, 2016, is admitted to probate. Margaret Mary Tucker is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for September 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Continued To Aug-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
